title: Upstart (UPST) Q3 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: Upstart Holdings (UPST) reported Q3 2024 earnings, with strong performance. The earnings date was Tuesday after market hours. Recent Performance: Upstart exceeded expectations in Q2, delivering revenues of $257.3 million, up 102% year-over-year, while beating analyst revenue estimates by 13.6%. The company also impressed with stronger-than-expected EBITDA guidance. Q3 Expectations: Analysts project revenue growth of 73.1% year-over-year to $280.6 million, with adjusted earnings anticipated at $0.42 per share. Analyst estimates have remained largely unchanged over the past month. Track Record: Upstart has only missed Wall Street's revenue estimates once over the last two years, exceeding top-line expectations by 6.5% on average. Valuation Gap: The stock trades at $47.68, significantly below the average analyst price target of $74.69. UPST has declined 9.4% over the past month, compared to a 1% average decline for other vertical software peers.
